presets.label: No smoking anywhere on the property
No parties or events
Quiet hours: 10pm — 8am
Max occupancy as listed; no extra unregistered guests
Please remove shoes inside
Pets allowed — please clean up after them
No pets, please
Day visitors must be approved in advance
Trash day is Wednesday — please bring bins to curb
Please lock all doors and windows when leaving
Keep thermostat between 65°F and 78°F
Report any damage or maintenance issues right away
Use the pool at your own risk; children must be supervised
Hot tub: rinse off before use; no glass nearby
Extinguish the fire pit completely before bed
Please leave the kitchen as clean as you found it
Wi-Fi is for personal use; no torrents or illegal downloads
Property is for personal use only — no filming or events
Respect the neighbors — they share the street with us
Check out by 11am unless late checkout is approved
Turn off lights and unplug small appliances at checkout
Leave used towels in the bathroom; we'll handle the rest
